svg.title: Seer — how data flows: from employee LLM surfaces, through the Seer coach on Google Cloud, to tier-separated insights
svg.desc: Marketing-oriented data-flow diagram of Seer. Left: where employees already use AI (browser extension across six LLM vendors and a hosted Open WebUI). Middle: the Seer coach (pre-flight block, post-flight flag, follow-up nudge) running on Google Cloud in the EU (Cloud Run, Firestore, europe-west1). Right: a privacy firewall separates employees (see their own sessions) from the employer (sees aggregates and AI-generated insights only).
svg.text: Seer
— visibility & guardrails for employee AI, without surveillance
How data flows: from the tools employees already use, through the Seer coach, to the insights each party is allowed to see.
1 · WHERE EMPLOYEES WORK WITH AI
2 · SEER COACH & INGEST · on Google Cloud
3 · WHO SEES WHAT
Browser extension
Firefox · Chrome
Rides along inside the chat UIs employees already use:
Nothing to change in the employee's workflow — the extension
rides along with the existing chat. Same guardrails, every vendor.
MV2 (Firefox) + MV3 (Chrome) · one install per browser
Seer Chat · our hosted AI workspace
Open WebUI fork with the coach baked in — pre-flight block,
post-flight flags and follow-ups, without an extension.
Cloud Run · any OpenAI-compatible model
Code coach
Cursor, Claude Code, VS Code agents
NEXT
Every message is inspected — the coach can step in three ways:
Pre-flight block
Stops policy violations before they reach the LLM —
no secrets, PII or banned-topic leaks leave the browser.
Post-flight flag
Catches hallucinations, sycophancy and risky replies —
warns the user before they act on the answer.
Follow-up nudge
Auto-sends a clarifying user message to push the model
toward a better answer — optional, per policy.
events (redacted)
Seer backend · hosted on Google Cloud, in the EU
europe-west1
/exec/insights — LLM-generated aggregate insights
Runs only over non-personal aggregates · min. cohort size (k-anonymity)
PERSONAL ZONE
The employee
sees their own sessions and coach feedback

g.text: • Full transcripts of their own AI conversations
• Personal policy feedback (“this prompt leaked secrets”)
• Their own skill/usage signals — not shared upwards
• Right to erasure, export, access (GDPR Art. 15–17)

svg.text: Per-user encryption key
PRIVACY FIREWALL · no personal data crosses
AGGREGATE ZONE
The employer
Sees anonymous, aggregated insights

g.text: • Team & org usage: what AI is used for, where, how much
• AI-generated insights over the aggregates (no re-ID)

svg.text: Aggregate dashboard only
EU: default; non-EU customers may opt into individual view.
CORE PRINCIPLES
seerai.covenance.ai · Covenance · pre-release prototype — data flow as of 2026-04
